judge_explanation: The AI agent correctly identified the lack of statistical significance based on p-values, but failed to apply multiple methods or validate the absence of effect using feature importance or robustness checks. The Likert score is very deterministic based solely on p-values, lacking nuance. Completeness scores low as deeper analysis (e.g., evaluating confounders or effect sizes) is absent. Clarity is compromised by focusing only on significance without offering insight into feature directions or relationships.
